description_long: This stool features a geometric, angular design with a square seat and a single, blocky backrest on one side. The entire surface is covered in a vibrant, multicolored pattern of brushstroke-like markings in red, green, blue, purple, and yellow, giving it a playful and artistic appearance. The legs are thick and rectangular, providing a sturdy base, while the seat is flat and wide enough for comfortable sitting. The backrest is positioned asymmetrically, extending from one side of the seat and rising vertically. The stool appears to be constructed from solid wood or a similar material, with the painted surface adding a decorative touch. Its bold, abstract aesthetic makes it suitable for urban parks, public plazas, or creative community spaces.
description: A sturdy, angular stool with a single side backrest and a vivid, multicolored brushstroke pattern covering its entire surface. Its geometric form and artistic finish make it visually striking and suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square seat, thick legs, and the single backrest on the left side, with the colorful brushstroke pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the vertical backrest, and the continuous multicolored pattern along the side surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the backrest and the open space beneath the seat, with the pattern wrapping around all surfaces.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the thickness of the legs and the asymmetrical placement of the backrest, with the vibrant pattern visible on all faces.
